prompt: How did my [Campaign Name] campaign perform?
expected: Should return summary with Total Sent, CTR, Open Rate, Unsub Rate. Default to last 7 days.

prompt: How many total Email clicks did I get last week?
expected: Should aggregate counts across all Email campaigns. Should NOT provide aggregated CTR.

prompt: Chart my [Campaign Name] open rate over the last 14 days
expected: Generate time series chart with daily granularity. Provide 2-4 sentence summary.

prompt: Compare click rates for [Campaign A], [Campaign B], and [Campaign C] over the past week
expected: Generate chart with 3 campaign series. All must have started within the past week AND after 11/11/2025.

prompt: Give me a summary of my campaign performance last week
expected: Show # of campaigns by channel, channel-level counts (NO aggregated rates), top 3 by CTR.

prompt: Show me my top 5 Push campaigns from last month
expected: Rank by Open Rate (NOT CTR). Do NOT include CTR for Push. Show top 3, offer next 2.

prompt: What was the CTR for [Campaign Name] in [month outside campaign period]?
expected: Detect campaign sent outside requested timeframe. Offer to see performance for original period.

prompt: What was my average click rate across all SMS campaigns this month?
expected: Should NOT provide aggregated rate. Explain aggregating rates across campaigns not supported.

prompt: How did my [ambiguous campaign name] campaign perform?
expected: If multiple matches, list all with disambiguation details (name, channel). Ask to clarify.

prompt: Show me the click rate for my [Campaign Name] campaign in October 2025
expected: Detect campaign before 11/11/2025. Explain no data supported before Nov 11 2025.

prompt: How is my [non-existent campaign] campaign doing?
expected: Cannot find campaign. Show 3 most recent campaigns. Ask if user wants one of those.

prompt: What was my revenue from the [Campaign Name] campaign?
expected: Clearly state revenue not supported. Offer supported metrics. Ask 'Would any of these help?'

prompt: Show me click rate excluding bot traffic for [Campaign Name]
expected: Explain filtered metrics not available. Provide unfiltered CTR instead.

prompt: Give me a summary of my campaign performance for November 2025
expected: Provide summary for Nov 11-30 only. Display warning about data starting Nov 11.

prompt: Chart total sends and total clicks for all Email campaigns over the past month
expected: Handle different scales. Chart should scale appropriately (dual Y-axis or log scale).

prompt: Compare [Campaign A] and [Campaign B] over the past week
expected: Generate side-by-side comparison with supported metrics.
